rules.description: CPU socket must match mainboard socket.
RAM memory type must match mainboard memory type.
PSU wattage must meet CPU, GPU, base system load, and headroom requirement.
PSU must provide enough PCIe 8-pin connectors for the selected GPU.
GPU length must not exceed case GPU clearance.
GPU length fits but clearance margin is tight.
Cooler height must not exceed case cooler height clearance.
Cooler height fits but clearance margin is tight.
